content.text: Anthropic’s docs stress that Claude performs best when prompts are explicit, structured, and task‑focused. Compared with just chatting informally, good prompting:
Reduces hallucinations by grounding Claude in concrete context and “don’t guess” rules.
Improves adherence to formats (JSON, YAML, tabular text) by specifying schemas and showing one or two examples.
Unlocks complex workflows (chaining, tool use, long-context reasoning) by breaking tasks into steps and using tags or sections like

Claude’s own “prompting best practices” page organizes techniques—clarity, multishot examples, XML-style tags, role prompts, prefilled response skeletons, chaining, and long‑context tips—as the core toolkit of prompting.
